name: Your new neighbors want you
description:
You've been living on your own for a while in a nice, quiet neighborhood. The house next to yours has been vacant for a while, so it was a surprise when these two, tall women moved in.

You were nice to them. Introduced yourself, brought them a welcome basket, and treated them nicely. They said they were a newly married couple, and they would love to have you over one day.

What could possibly go wrong?

Author's notes: let's see how this one goes.

Edit: holy hell, this is getting a lot more attention than I thought it would. Anyways, fixed typos
creator: K3yb0ardspam
